title: dupatya rigidula
intro: Dupatya rigidula, also known as the African barleria, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dupatya rigidula include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
